description: Create a professional Certified Staff Compensation Schedule for Maplewood Consolidated School District #18 (2024-2025) using the data from /home/ga/Documents/district_compensation_data.json. The document should feature the District Name, Document Title, and Fiscal Year at the top, an automated Table of Contents, and distinct sections for 'Salary Schedule', 'Extra-Duty Stipends', and 'Benefits'. The Salary Schedule must be a 12-step by 6-lane grid, and the other sections should contain tables for stipends and benefits. Ensure the document uses professional styles, includes page numbers, and is saved as /home/ga/Documents/Maplewood_Salary_Schedule_2024_2025.odt.
